title: MNC: HR Benefits (Expat Management) and Admin Executive
description:
*Seeking for a talent with minimum 5 years of HR benefits/expat management and HR Admin exposure*

THE COMPANY

A credible, reliable specialist and label in their field, this Multinational Corporation (MNC) seeks to look for a HR Benefits and Admin Executive who is able to be part of the HR and office admin.

JOB RESPONSIBILITIES

  • Handle HR benefits/management (focused on Expat management- whole lifecycle) for Accommodation, Flight, transportation, education or other related allowance
  • Monitor on the expat management processes/benefits
  • Study and monitor trends and cost on the expat management processes/benefits
  • Stay up to date on current market norms and policies
  • Ensure compliance of expat management policies
  • Involve in expat management process improvements projects
  • Support other colleagues in general admin work (Data entry and Filing, update mailing/phone list etc)
  • Booking of Flight, Visas, Hotel/Accommodation/rental, Travel schedules/activities, Insurance planned etc.
  • Handle/co-ordinate company’s events/gifts
  • Any other adhoc duties

JOB REQUIREMENTS

  • Diploma/Degree in Business Studies/Secretarial/Administration/Management or any other relevant certifications
  • Minimum 5 years of HR benefits/expat management and HR Admin exposure
  • Patient, highly organized, versatile, has good interpersonal and communication skills

If you will like to explore this opportunity, please email your resume in Microsoft Word format to marie@resolutehunter.com

We thank you for your interest and will contact shortlisted candidates for more detailed discussion.

For more job openings, please visit our websiteat https://resolutehunter.com/opportunities/ 

EA Licence 18C9105 
EA Reg R1105305

We are a team of certified and experienced Search professionals with an impeccable track record in their specialized fields.


We are RESOLUTE in our drive to cultivate valued partnerships with our clients and candidates. We make every experience count. Are you ready to make YOUR experience count, today?
